notes: v220 — Big chart upgrade: 🕯 candlestick view, works with touch on phones, your paper trades drawn on the chart (▲ buys ▼ sells 🎯 target 🛑 stop), gold dots on accumulation days, average-volume line, 1Y timeframe, 'vs mkt' index overlay, log scale, and a smarter 4-week range band. Plus v219's panel fix and updated lessons.
